title: corylus formosana
intro: Corylus formosana, also known as the Taiwan hazelnut, is a deciduous shrub native to Taiwan, belonging to the hazelnut family (Corylaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Corylus formosana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, bark, and seeds are used in various herbal preparations.
